summary: Frontend regression executed for Supabase migration flows. Login and route rendering work for client/professional/admin, but appointments integrations fail with Supabase REST 400, breaking agenda/status/realtime-dependent validations.

ui_bugs.issue: Status badge shows 'Falha' after login because appointments fetch returns 400.

integration_issues.issue: GET appointments query fails with HTTP 400, list remains empty and cancellation/realtime checks cannot be validated.
Appointments queries fail with HTTP 400, no actionable appointment rows available for status transitions.
Appointments queries fail with HTTP 400, advance/cancel actions unavailable due to missing loaded records.
Could not validate realtime propagation because base appointments fetch is failing with 400 before subscription usefulness can be observed.

issues: Console warns about deprecated shadow* style props and pointerEvents prop usage (non-blocking).

action_items: Fix Supabase appointments REST 400 responses for relation-heavy selects in useAppointments and professional next-appointment query.
Verify table schema/RLS/foreign keys match aliases used in selects (client/professional/service/establishment joins).
After fixing query errors, retest create/cancel/edit status and realtime propagation end-to-end across client/professional/admin.
Add stable data-testid to auth modal fields in /app/src/app/[slug]/booking.tsx if public booking auth fallback must be automated later.
critical_code_review_comments: useAppointments and dashboard-specific direct queries rely on complex FK alias projections; current Supabase response 400 indicates contract mismatch (schema/policy/select path), which blocks key product flows.
Public and route consolidation checks passed (/(admin), /(professional), /(client), public /salon/[slug] and booking path render correctly).
No active WatermelonDB references detected in /app/src search for watermelon/@nozbe/useSync/database imports.
seed_data_creation: Attempted booking creation through UI; no explicit seed marker record confirmed due downstream appointments fetch failures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three credentialed logins succeed. Public profile and booking UI render. Blocking issue is Supabase REST 400 on appointments endpoints with relation selects, causing sync failure and empty agendas. Re-run same multi-role scenario after query/policy fix.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: login as client/pro/admin and open appointment-driven screens; network returns 400 for /rest/v1/appointments queries with nested FK alias selects and date filters. Impact: agendas empty, status updates/cancel/realtime validation blocked. Likely root cause: select contract mismatch with current DB schema or RLS/policy constraints on joined relations post-migration. Mitigation: simplify query to baseline columns, validate incrementally each relation join and policy access, then restore full projection.
